briefdescription.para: Macro for creating shell UART transport instance named _name.

simplesect.para: Additional arguments are accepted (but ignored) for compatibility with previous Zephyr version, it will be removed in future release.

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to the shell UART backend instance.

detaileddescription.para: Function returns pointer to the shell UART instance. This instance can be next used with shell_execute_cmd function in order to test commands behavior.

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to the smp shell data of the UART shell transport.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the smp shell data.
